violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Working container holding food item was not labeled properly to identify contents. - Working containers in fridge and prep cooler needs to be dated and labeled.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. - Wet cloth was sitting on counter during inspection. Needs to be stored in sani bucket between uses.

General premises. — --Window/door used for ventilation purposes was not properly protected against the entry of insects and rodents. - Outside door to kitchen was propped open during inspection for ventilation. No screen door provided.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Backflow prevention, back siphonage (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
